: Synthesized 2026-07-14 to exercise SSE-spec framing the mainstream
: providers do not normally emit but the parser must survive: a single
: event whose JSON payload is split across TWO `data:` lines (the SSE
: spec joins multiple data: lines with '\n'; the join point here is
: between JSON tokens, so the assembled payload is still valid JSON).
: A bare `:` comment precedes it. One tool_call (noop, {}) is carried
: whole in the multi-line event, then finish_reason:tool_calls and
: data: [DONE]. NOTE: not real provider behavior -- a robustness
: fixture for extractOpenAIDataLine's multi-line data: handling.

: comment before a multiline-data event

data: {"id":"chatcmpl-ml","object":"chat.completion.chunk","created":1730500300,"model":"gpt-4o-2024-08-06","choices":[{"index":0,"delta":{"tool_calls":[{"index":0,"id":"call_ml","type":"function",
data: "function":{"name":"noop","arguments":"{}"}}]},"finish_reason":null}]}

data: {"id":"chatcmpl-ml","object":"chat.completion.chunk","created":1730500300,"model":"gpt-4o-2024-08-06","choices":[{"index":0,"delta":{},"finish_reason":"tool_calls"}]}

data: [DONE]
